tasks.description: Design a complete token launch plan including tokenomics, security analysis, and liquidity bootstrapping strategy
tasks.input: I'm building a DeFi lending protocol on BSC and need to launch a governance token. Design a complete launch plan including: tokenomics (supply model, distribution, vesting), smart contract architecture recommendations with security checklist, liquidity bootstrapping strategy (initial pool, LP lock, anti-bot measures), and a 90-day post-launch roadmap. The token should incentivize long-term protocol usage, not speculation.

scoring.5: Designs a complete tokenomics model: supply type justified for DeFi governance, distribution across 5+ categories with community as the largest, vesting schedules with cliff periods for all insider categories, emission schedule that decreases over time, explicit token sinks (governance locking, fee buyback); models monthly sell pressure for 12+ months
scoring.3: Provides tokenomics with distribution and vesting but missing sell pressure analysis or token sinks
scoring.1: Basic allocation table without vesting details or economic modeling

scoring.5: Recommends specific OpenZeppelin base contracts; reviews the 10-point audit checklist; flags rugpull vectors and mitigation; recommends owner privilege minimization with renunciation timeline; specifies Solidity version and compiler settings; recommends pre-launch audit
scoring.3: Mentions security considerations but checklist is incomplete or recommendations are generic
scoring.1: Brief mention of 'get an audit' without specific analysis

scoring.5: Designs initial liquidity: pool size calculation based on target market cap, token:BNB ratio for starting price, LP lock plan (platform, duration, percentage), anti-bot measures (max tx, max wallet, progressive tax), liquidity growth plan (mining incentives or POL strategy)
scoring.3: Covers initial pool and lock but missing anti-bot measures or growth plan
scoring.1: Mentions 'add liquidity to PancakeSwap' without specific parameters

scoring.5: Detailed 90-day roadmap with weekly milestones for month 1 and monthly milestones for months 2-3; includes governance activation timeline, exchange listing strategy, marketing plan, and vesting unlock preparation; ties roadmap to token utility growth
scoring.3: Has a roadmap but lacks specificity or timeline detail
scoring.1: Vague mention of 'post-launch plans' without structure
